title: Number of Prints in French Libraries, sorted by decade
query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rism: <https://rism.online/api/v1#>
PREFIX pmo: <http://performedmusicontology.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX relators: <http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/relators/>
PREFIX schemaorg: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (STR(?dec) AS ?decade) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?source) AS ?count) WHERE {
    ?source a rism:Source;
            rdfs:label ?title ;
            rism:hasHolding ?copy ;
            rism:hasDates/rism:earliestDate ?date .
	MINUS { ?source rism:isPartOf ?parent . }
    ?copy rism:hasHoldingInstitution/rdfs:label ?institution .
    FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?institution), "F-"))
    BIND((ROUND(?date / 10) * 10) AS ?dec)
}
GROUP BY ?dec
HAVING(?dec > 1490 && ?dec < 2100)
ORDER BY ?dec

title: List of composers with an aggregate of the sigla where their sources are held
query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rism: <https://rism.online/api/v1#>
PREFIX pmo: <http://performedmusicontology.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX relators: <http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/relators/>
PREFIX schemaorg: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?composer ?composer_id (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?siglum; SEPARATOR=',') as ?sigla) (COUNT(DISTINCT (?source)) AS ?source_count) WHERE {
        ?source a rism:Source ;
        dcterms:creator [ rdfs:label ?composer ] ;
		dcterms:creator ?composer_id ;
		rism:hasHolding ?examplar .
    ?examplar rism:hasHoldingInstitution ?institution .
    ?institution rism:hasSiglum ?siglum .
} GROUP BY ?composer ?composer_id
ORDER BY DESC(?source_count)

title: People in RISM listed as a dedicatee, by unique institution
query:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rism: <https://rism.online/api/v1#>
PREFIX pmo: <http://performedmusicontology.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX relators: <http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/relators/>
PREFIX schemaorg: <https://schema.org/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?person (?pName AS ?name) (COUNT(?institution) as ?count) WHERE {
    SELECT ?person ?pName ?institution ?iName (COUNT(?person) as ?count1) WHERE {
        ?source a rism:Source ;
            rism:hasMaterialGroup/rism:hasSummary ?group ;
            rism:hasHolding ?copy ;
            rism:hasMaterialGroup?/rism:hasRelationship ?dte .
			?dte dcterms:relation ?person ;
                 rism:hasRole relators:dte .
		    ?group a dcterms:type ;
       			rdf:value ?source_type .
        ?copy rism:hasHoldingInstitution ?institution .
        ?institution rdfs:label ?iName .
        ?person rdfs:label ?pName .
        ?person a rism:Person .
        #FILTER(STR(?source_type) = "Autograph manuscript")
    }
    GROUP BY ?person ?institution ?pName ?iName
    HAVING(?count1)
    ORDER BY ?person
}
GROUP BY ?person ?pName
HAVING(?count > 1)
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

title: List of the sources with composer, title, dates and publication place
Analysis of key signatures and their relationship to time signatures
List of people as dedicatees by number of sources
query:
PREFIX rism: <https://rism.online/api/v1#>
  PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
  PREFIX relators: <http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/relators/>
  PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  SELECT ?person (SAMPLE(?name) AS ?personName) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?source) AS ?dedicateeCount) WHERE {
    ?source rism:hasRelationship ?rel .
    ?rel rism:hasRole relators:dte ;
         dcterms:relation ?person .

    ?person rdfs:label ?name .
  }
  GROUP BY ?person
  ORDER BY DESC(?dedicateeCount)
  LIMIT 100
